## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] If Python bindings changed: `pytest python/tests` and the rebalance example
- [ ] Docs / changelog updated when user-facing behavior changes
